courses.title: Python
courses.description: Master the most versatile language: from scripting to data automation.

content.title: 1. Hello World
content.instructions: Python uses the print() function to display text on the screen.
content.challenge: Print to the screen: Hello Python

content.title: 2. Numerical Variables
content.instructions: You can store numbers in variables simply by using the equals sign (=).
content.challenge: Create a variable 'points' with the value 100.

content.title: 3. Hello World
content.instructions: Python uses the print() function to display text on the screen.

courses.title: React
courses.description: Build modern interfaces with components and hooks.

content.title: 1. Basic Components
content.instructions: A React component must always return a JSX element.
content.challenge: Make the component return an <h1> element with the text 'Welcome'.

content.title: 2. Text Props
content.instructions: Props allow you to pass information to components.
content.challenge:
Return a paragraph

containing the 'name' prop.

content.title: 1. Definition of ML
content.instructions: ML is the study of algorithms that learn from data.

content.title: 1. Annotations
content.challenge: Write the main Spring Boot annotation.
